text: Apply the residue theorem: integral around the closed contour equals 2 pi i times sum of residues, which is 2 pi i times 1 over 2 i, equals pi. Now check the big arc. On the semicircle of radius R, modulus of f is at most 1 over (R squared minus 1). Length of arc is pi R. So the arc integral is bounded by pi R over (R squared minus 1), which goes to zero as R goes to infinity. Done!
